targetRuntimeSurface: Mixed runtime operationalization and engine self-improvement. hostConsumableDescription: If promoted, Directive Workspace web host (frontend/ + hosts/web-host/) would receive a reimplement integration of "Scientify Mixed Adoption Target Pressure" (Mixed runtime operationalization and engine self-improvement. The host would need to provide a runtime surface for the integration mode "reimplement" with the required gates: behavior_preservation, metric_improvement_or_equivalent_value, runtime_boundary_review.
